ground_truth.title: Dentistry
ground_truth.main_content:
Let your smile show how good it feels to be healthy. At Equitas Health, your whole person healthcare can include quality, comfortable, and affordable dental care.

New Hours: Now open
MON - FRI, 9 AM - 6 PM!

Dental care should make you smile.
At Equitas Health, you get quality dentistry in a full-service health center with a trained and caring staff. Our team of dentists, dental assistants, and dental hygienists works with you to explore how best to meet the needs of you and your family.

We offer:
Emergency Dental Care
Preventive Care
Cleanings
Exams & x-rays
Oral cancer screening
Oral hygiene training
Restorative Care
Fillings (amalgam and composite)
Crowns
Extractions & root canals
Removable
Dentures
Partials
Tooth whitening
Mouthguards/nightguards
We accept insurance
Our dental clinics accept Medicaid and most major private insurance plans. If you do not have insurance, or your insurance does not make your dental care affordable, please apply for our sliding fee scale. You deserve a healthy mouth!
Billing for Office Visits
Payment will be due at the time of service. Office visits include dental exams, cleanings, and x-rays.
Patients with dental insurance: We will contact your insurance company to check your coverage. We will also find out how much you will pay for your visit.
Patients without dental insurance: You may apply for a reduced price through the Sliding Fee Discount. We will ask you about your income and household size to determine your payment amount.
Billing for Procedures
You will get an appointment for any needed procedures after your office visits. Procedures include, but are not limited to, bonding, bridges, crowns, dentures, extractions, fillings, fluoride, and root canals. For a full list of dental procedures and costs, see the Dental Fee Schedule.
For procedures, you will pay half (50%) of the total cost when you make your appointment. For example, if your procedure costs $100, you would pay $50 for that procedure. The rest of your payment will be due at the time of service.
If you are unable to pay the balance, you can:
Make a new appointment for your procedure, or
Get a refund for the money you paid up front.
Patients with dental insurance: We will contact your insurance company to check your coverage. We will also find out how much you will pay for your procedure.
Patients without dental insurance: If you qualify for the Sliding Fee Discount program, you will get a 35% discount on the regular cost of dental procedures listed in Equitas Health’s Dental Fee Schedule. We will honor any Sliding Fee Scale approvals that were granted prior to July 1, 2024.

Equitas Health Dentistry
Providers
Carolyn Cousins Bates, DDS
She/Her
Dentist
